name: Cribl Alert Escalation with Approval
description: Escalation workflow requiring manager approval before promoting to P1 incident

trigger.condition: (impact_score >= 80 AND state == 2 AND sys_updated_on <= gs.minutesAgo(30)) OR (sla_breached == true AND state != 6 AND state != 7)

stages.name: Check Escalation Eligibility
stages.description: Verify case hasn't already been escalated

stages.name: Request Approval
stages.description: Request security lead approval for incident escalation

approval_message.subject: [Approval Required] Escalate Cribl Alert ${trigger.number} to P1 Incident

values.work_notes: Escalation approved. Created P1 Incident: ${incident_record.number}. Incident Management team has been notified.

actions.subject: [P1 INCIDENT] ${incident_record.number} - Escalated from Cribl Alert ${trigger.number}

values.work_notes: Escalation to P1 Incident was rejected by approver. Case remains at current priority. Review reason and determine if further action is needed.
